title: Fix C++ .h grammar mismatch in realworld diff tests
description: C++ project .h files (descriptor.h) are parsed with C grammar by the CLI because .h maps to tree-sitter-c. The Go side uses C++ grammar. This is a test infra issue: RunDifferentialDir needs to pass grammar context to ParseWithCLI instead of inferring from extension. Also consider if C redis server.h and curl curl.h have the same issue (unlikely - those are actual C headers).
